//: Runtime-only config for the headless tsx scripts (smoke/sweep). boardgame.io ships its subpaths via the legacy `module` field, which the tsx/node resolver does not follow (it probes for index.jsx and fails). These aliases point the subpaths at the CJS build so the scripts run. tsx does not type-check, so the typeless CJS target is fine here; `npm run typecheck` uses the base config, where tsc resolves the real .d.ts subpaths natively, and Vite resolves the ESM build for the browser bundle.
